footer.aboutText: Historic town in Transylvania, Romania, known for its medieval fortress and stunning mountain scenery.
footer.copyright: © 2026 Discover Rasnov. Made with ❤ for tourists.

hero.title: Welcome to Rasnov
hero.subtitle: Explore Historic Fortress, Stunning Nature & Romanian Culture

fortress.title: Rasnov Fortress
fortress.desc: A medieval citadel built by Teutonic Knights in the 13th century. Offers breathtaking panoramic views of the surrounding Carpathian Mountains.

dinoparc.title: Dino Parc
dinoparc.desc: The largest dinosaur park in Southeast Europe with life-size animatronic dinosaurs. Perfect for families and children.

peak.title: Piatra Mica Peak
peak.desc: Hiking trail to a stunning mountain peak. Accessible via cable car or hiking trail, offering spectacular mountain views.

museum.title: Village Museum
museum.desc: Explore traditional Romanian rural life with authentic houses, tools, and artifacts from the region's history.

bran.title: Bran Castle
bran.desc: Famous Dracula's Castle, just 15 minutes away. Gothic fortress with fascinating history and stunning architecture.

poiana.title: Poiana Brasov Ski Resort
poiana.desc: Premier ski resort nearby with 23km of slopes. Great for winter sports enthusiasts and summer hiking.

brasov.title: Brasov Old Town
brasov.desc: Medieval city center with Council Square, Black Church, and charming cobblestone streets. Only 15km away.

peles.title: Peles Castle
peles.desc: Neo-Renaissance masterpiece in Sinaia. One of Europe's most beautiful castles with 160 lavishly decorated rooms.

nationalPark.title: Piatra Craiului National Park
nationalPark.desc: Protected natural area with dramatic limestone ridge. Excellent hiking, wildlife watching, and pristine nature.

bearSanctuary.title: Libearty Bear Sanctuary
bearSanctuary.desc: Europe's largest brown bear sanctuary. Home to rescued bears in natural habitat. Educational and ethical tourism.

cetate.title: Cetate Restaurant
cetate.desc: Traditional Romanian cuisine in the heart of the fortress. Try their famous sarmale and mici with polenta.

ceaun.title: La Ceaun
ceaun.desc: Cozy tavern serving hearty mountain dishes. Their ciorbă (sour soup) and grilled trout are must-tries.

pizzeria.title: Pizzeria Castello
pizzeria.desc: Italian pizzeria with a Romanian twist. Wood-fired pizzas and pasta dishes with local ingredients.

cafe.title: Cafe Central
cafe.desc: Modern cafe with excellent coffee, pastries, and light meals. Perfect for breakfast or afternoon break.

belvedere.title: Belvedere Terrace
belvedere.desc: Restaurant with panoramic terrace. International cuisine with spectacular mountain views and sunset dining.

grillHouse.title: Grill House Rasnov
grillHouse.desc: BBQ specialist with outdoor grill. Famous for mixed grills, fresh salads, and local wines.

bistro.title: Bistro Rasnoveana
bistro.desc: Casual bistro in town center. Daily specials, homemade desserts, and friendly atmosphere.

vegetarian.title: Vegetarian Haven
vegetarian.desc: Plant-based restaurant with creative dishes. Vegan options, organic ingredients, and healthy bowls.

ambient.title: Hotel Ambient
ambient.desc: Modern 4-star hotel with spa facilities, mountain views, and excellent breakfast. Close to fortress.

belvedere.title: Pension Belvedere
belvedere.desc: Family-run guesthouse with traditional Romanian hospitality. Homemade breakfast and stunning views.

petre.title: Casa Petre
petre.desc: Charming apartments in the old town. Fully equipped kitchens and authentic Romanian decor.

hostel.title: Mountain Hostel
hostel.desc: Budget-friendly hostel perfect for backpackers. Shared kitchen, common area, and organized hiking trips.

villa.title: Villa Carpathia
villa.desc: Luxury villa with private garden and pool. Perfect for families or groups seeking privacy and comfort.

boutique.title: Boutique Hotel Residence
boutique.desc: Stylish boutique hotel with modern amenities. Rooftop bar, gym, and contemporary design throughout.

cabins.title: Mountain Cabins
cabins.desc: Cozy wooden cabins in nature. Perfect for romantic getaways with fireplace and private terrace.

casaMaria.title: Casa Maria B&B
casaMaria.desc: Traditional bed and breakfast with local charm. Hearty homemade meals and personal service.

map.title: Interactive Map
map.subtitle: Interactive map showing all locations, restaurants, and accommodations

huntHero.title: Treasure Hunt
huntHero.subtitle: Scan QR codes at 8 historic Rasnov locations to earn points!

leaderboard.title: 🏆 Leaderboard
leaderboard.subtitle: Top Rasnov Explorers - Ranked by Points

qr.help: Point your camera at a QR code at any treasure hunt location

photoCapture.title: 📸 Capture This Location
photoCapture.help: Now take a picture of this site!

firstDiscovery.message: You found your first location! Add your name to appear on the leaderboard.

survey.title: Quick Survey
survey.message: Would you like to take a quick survey about your time in Rasnov? We look over every response to improve the site!
survey.reward: 🎁 Unlock a special site theme as a thank you!
